name: dither
description: Vector dither tool — web app + Illustrator plugin

scripts.dev: npm run build:web && npx serve dist/web
scripts.build:web: mkdir -p dist/web && esbuild packages/web/app.js --bundle --outfile=dist/web/app.js --format=esm && cp packages/web/index.html packages/web/favicon.svg dist/web/
scripts.build:illustrator: npm run build:illustrator-ui && cd packages/illustrator && cmake -B build -G Xcode -DAI_SDK_PATH=/Users/joshpigford/Development/sdks/Illustrator && xcodebuild -project build/Dither.xcodeproj -configuration Release -quiet
scripts.install:illustrator: npm run build:illustrator && sudo cp -R packages/illustrator/build/Release/Dither.aip '/Applications/Adobe Illustrator 2026/Plug-ins.localized/' && rm -f ~/Library/Preferences/'Adobe Illustrator 30 Settings'/en_US/aggressivePlugincache_v2.bin ~/Library/Preferences/'Adobe Illustrator 30 Settings'/en_US/AggressiveDelayLoad-Plug-in\ Cache && echo 'Installed. Restart Illustrator.'
scripts.release:illustrator:
npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && npm run build:illustrator && cd packages/illustrator/build/Release && zip -r ../../../../Dither.aip.zip Dither.aip && cd ../../../.. && VERSION=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && git add package.json && git commit -m "v${VERSION}" && git tag v${VERSION} && gh release create v${VERSION} Dither.aip.zip --title "Dither v${VERSION}" --notes "### Illustrator Plugin

Download **Dither.aip.zip**, unzip, and move to:
\`\`\`
/Applications/Adobe Illustrator 2026/Plug-ins.localized/
\`\`\`
Restart Illustrator. Open via **Window → Dither**." && rm Dither.aip.zip && echo "Released v${VERSION}"
scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:illustrator-ui
